targets.expr: 1 - (sum by (oxide_host, silo_name) (rate(virtual_machine:vcpu_usage_total{state="idle", oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m])) / sum by (oxide_host, silo_name) (rate(virtual_machine:vcpu_usage_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m])))

1 - (sum by (oxide_host, silo_name, project_name, instance_id) (rate(virtual_machine:vcpu_usage_total{state="idle", oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m])) / sum by (oxide_host, silo_name, project_name, instance_id) (rate(virtual_machine:vcpu_usage_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m])))

sum by (oxide_host, silo_name, attached_instance_id) (rate(virtual_disk:reads_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", attached_instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))

sum by (oxide_host, silo_name, attached_instance_id) (rate(virtual_disk:writes_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", attached_instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))

sum by (oxide_host, silo_name, attached_instance_id) (rate(virtual_disk:flushes_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", attached_instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))
sum by (oxide_host, silo_name) (rate(instance_network_interface:bytes_sent_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))

sum by (oxide_host, silo_name, instance_id) (rate(instance_network_interface:bytes_sent_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))

sum by (oxide_host, silo_name) (rate(instance_network_interface:bytes_received_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))

sum by (oxide_host, silo_name, instance_id) (rate(instance_network_interface:bytes_received_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))
sum by (oxide_host, silo_name) (rate(instance_network_interface:packets_sent_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))

sum by (oxide_host, silo_name, instance_id) (rate(instance_network_interface:packets_sent_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))

sum by (oxide_host, silo_name) (rate(instance_network_interface:packets_received_total{oxide_host="$oxide_host", silo_name=~"$silo_name", project_name=~"$project_name", instance_id=~"$instance_id"}[5m]))
